description: The 'Ndrina Palamara is a 'ndrina (organized crime family) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Africo, Calabria, Italy. It is allied with the Bruzzaniti and Morabito clans. The group has been involved in drug trafficking, particularly cocaine from South America via Senegal, and in the rigging of public contracts in the tourism and hydroelectric sectors. Members have been arrested in multiple operations, including 'Naos' in 2008.

country_links.context: The organization trafficked drugs internationally between Belgium, Germany, and the Netherlands.
